title: UEi DL589 Multimeter Guide Study Module (educational content)

requirements.summary: Add a new Study module entry under Tools & Instruments and wire it to a dedicated guide view without impacting other modules.
acceptanceCriteria: A new navigation option/module card labeled "UEi DL589 Multimeter Guide" is visible on the Study home screen.
Selecting the new module opens a dedicated module view for the guide.
No text/content or behavior changes occur in other Study modules (including the existing "Multimeter Training" module).

file_operations.description: Add a new module card/button labeled "UEi DL589 Multimeter Guide" (Tools & Instruments) and extend the onNavigate view union to include the new guide view; keep existing module cards unchanged.
Extend the local StudyTab view state union and conditional rendering to support navigating to the new "UEi DL589 Multimeter Guide" dedicated view, while leaving existing view behaviors intact.
Create the dedicated module view component for the "UEi DL589 Multimeter Guide" using existing Study module layout patterns (Card/Separator/Alert) and exporting it for use in StudyTab.

requirements.summary: Implement the UEi DL589 guide as cleanly formatted educational content with 10 distinct function sections.
acceptanceCriteria: The module view renders 10 clearly separated sections matching the listed functions.
Each section is readable and consistently formatted using clear headers and spacing (e.g., cards/separators consistent with existing Study modules).
All user-facing text in the module is in English.

file_operations.description: Implement the 10 required sections with consistent formatting and spacing: AC Voltage (VAC), DC Voltage (VDC), AC Amps (Clamp meter use), DC Amps (Inverter systems), Resistance (Ohms), Continuity, Capacitance (microfarads), Temperature measurement (dual thermocouples), Frequency (Hz), and Differential temperature (Delta T).

requirements.summary: Add the required five subsections to every function section in the UEi DL589 guide.
acceptanceCriteria: Every one of the 10 function sections includes all five required subsections.
Power ON/OFF rules are explicitly stated for each function (not implied).
HVAC-specific examples are present in each section and relate to real HVAC diagnostic/measurement contexts.
Common mistakes and safety warnings are present in each section and are clearly distinguishable from the other subsections.

file_operations.description: For each of the 10 function sections, add subsections with clear labels: When to use it, Power ON or Power OFF rules (explicit), HVAC-specific examples, Common mistakes, and Safety warnings; ensure each section includes all five.

requirements.summary: Keep the UEi DL589 guide educational-only with no simulations or interactive tool behavior.
acceptanceCriteria: The new module contains educational content only (reading/scrolling/collapsing is acceptable), with no simulator widgets, dynamic measurement generators, or interactive tool simulations.
No existing simulator components under study tools are reused/embedded for this guide.

file_operations.description: Ensure the guide remains stable and educational-only: do not import or embed any simulator components (e.g., study/tools/*), do not add dynamic measurement generators; limit UI to static educational content and optional native collapsing (e.g., details/summary) only.
